stories.headline: Tehran and Trump trade threats amid renewed Iran war ceasefire proposal push
stories.summary: Iran warns of more devastating retaliation if the US hits civilian targets, as mediators push a 45-day ceasefire to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
stories.summary: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

stories.headline: Vietnam’s gig workers slammed by rising fuel costs amid fallout of Iran war
stories.summary: Diesel prices have more than doubled in the Southeast Asian nation amid Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Pakistan offers ‘two-phased’ truce deal to end US-Israel war on Iran
stories.summary: Iran, while still reviewing the proposal, says it won't reopen Hormuz as part of a temporary ceasefire.

Trump declares victory after rescue but threats to US operation in Iran still loom
stories.summary: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.

stories.headline: Jobless young Palestinians trapped as Israel holds Gaza’s economy hostage
stories.summary: With 80 percent unemployed, young Palestinians struggle to survive as Israeli blockade causes economic collapse

stories.headline: US stock futures rise on Middle East ceasefire proposal
stories.summary: Proposal for 45-day ceasefire was shared by Pakistan, Egypt and Turkey ahead of Trump deadline

stories.headline: US Stocks Rise as Dip Buyers Return Amid Ceasefire Hopes
stories.summary: US equities and crude oil prices edged higher as investors focus on signs of a potential diplomatic push toward a ceasefire in the Iran war.

stories.headline: EU warns capitals against turning energy crunch into fiscal crisis
stories.summary: Excessive spending to cushion soaring prices would have ‘serious fiscal implications’, says economy commissioner

stories.headline: Ukraine and Syria to cooperate on security in unexpected military alliance
stories.summary: Ukraine's Zelenskyy arrived in Damascus in a surprise visit on Sunday, for his first official visit to Syria after the fall of the pro-Russian al-Assad regime.

stories.headline: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed
stories.summary: Tehran says it will respond 'in kind' to attacks on its infrastructure, accuses Trump of inciting 'war crimes'.

stories.headline: Jet fuel crisis: Rationing triggered at four airports in Italy
stories.summary: Four northern Italian airports introduce restrictions on jet fuel due to the energy crisis, with priority given to long-haul and medical flights. Meanwhile, Ryanair has warned that if the Iran war continues, summer flights are at risk across Europe.

stories.headline: Risk-On Equities Investors Choose Panic Buying Over Panic Selling
stories.summary: Matt Miskin, co-chief investment strategist at Manulife John Hancock Investments, says investors are looking to the dips to add to equities here as he examines market sentiment surrounding the Iran war. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: US Premarket Movers: Boot Barn, Carvana, Dow, Netflix, Kratos
stories.summary: US equity-index futures are mixed as traders weigh the latest developments in the war in the Middle East. Contracts on the S&P 500 Index are up 0.1% at 7:40 a.m. in New York.

stories.headline: India Raises Gas Supply for Fertilizer Firms as Imports Improve
stories.summary: India has increased the allocation of natural gas to urea plants as supply improves after disruptions due to the Middle East crisis, according to the oil ministry.

stories.headline: When Suzuki met Suzuki: why a Tokyo dating agency is matching couples with the same name
stories.summary: Japan’s ban on married couples having different surnames has prompted an event to highlight people’s reluctance to change their nameAt the very least, the three men and three women calming their nerves on a Friday evening at a venue in Tokyo know they have one thing in common.Spaced out across booths, they will soon be placed in pairs and given 15 minutes to get to know one another. Continue reading...

stories.headline: Indonesia raises fuel surcharges as oil crisis sparks airline industry outcry
Mitsotakis urges swift EU probe into MPs over Greek farm subsidy fraud
stories.summary: Greek PM Kyriakos Mitsotakis has asked EU prosecutors to swiftly charge MPs over alleged €23m farm subsidy fraud, as resignations and pressure mount.

stories.headline: Why this oil shock is different
stories.summary: Governments and central banks are out of policy ammunition to contain the economic fallout

stories.headline: Sales of used EVs surge in US as petrol prices pass $4 a gallon
stories.summary: Americans are buying second-hand electric vehicles even as the market for new vehicles slumps

stories.headline: Saudi Arabia charges record premium for its oil
stories.summary: World’s biggest crude exporter to ask Asian customers for around $20 a barrel on top of benchmark prices

stories.headline: Qatar LNG Ships U-Turn After Attempt to Pass Through Hormuz
stories.summary: Two liquefied natural gas tankers from Qatar in the Persian Gulf have switched to Pakistan as new destinations after appearing to abort an earlier attempt to leave via the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: BlackRock Files to Challenge Invesco’s Nasdaq 100 ETF Monopoly
stories.summary: BlackRock Inc. is setting its sights on a corner of the $13.7 trillion US exchange-traded fund industry long controlled by Invesco Ltd: tracking the Nasdaq 100 Index.

stories.headline: Blackstone-Backed Data Center Firm QTS Kicks Off Bond Sale
stories.summary: Blackstone Inc.-backed QTS kicked off the sale of a 10-year investment-grade green bond on Monday as the firm builds a major data center in the state of Georgia.

stories.headline: Senior Housing-Focused REIT National Healthcare Files for US IPO
stories.summary: National Healthcare Properties Inc., a real estate investment trust, filed for an initial public offering, positioning itself to capitalize on favorable demographic trends associated with a growing elderly population in the US.

stories.headline: Strategy Posts $14.5 Billion Unrealized Loss in First Quarter
stories.summary: Bitcoin accumulator Strategy Inc. registered a roughly $14.5 billion unrealized loss in the first quarter as the value of the Michael Saylor-led company’s cryptocurrency holdings fell.

stories.headline: India’s Refiners Delay Maintenance to Stabilize Fuel Supplies
stories.summary: Indian Oil Corp. and Bharat Petroleum Corp. have delayed routine maintenance at some of their units to ensure adequate supplies in the world’s third-largest oil consumer, according to a senior government official.

stories.headline: Chile Private Debt Attract New Cash Even as US Investors Seek Exits
stories.summary: SURA Investments and BTG Pactual Chile launched new private-credit funds in Chile, expanding in an industry that has set off alarm bells in the US after years of extraordinary growth.

stories.headline: Rupee Holds Gain After Biggest Surge in 12 Years on RBI Moves
stories.summary: The Indian rupee edged up, extending its biggest rally in 12 years after the central bank doubled down on curbing speculation against the local currency.

stories.headline: Italy Is Set to Name New Leonardo Chief as Soon as This Week
stories.summary: Italy is set to name a replacement for Leonardo SpA Chief Executive Officer Roberto Cingolani as soon as this week, according to people familiar with the matter, capping weeks of negotiations over the key corporate appointment.

stories.headline: Industrial Firm Madison Air Seeks to Raise $2.23 Billion in IPO
stories.summary: Madison Air Solutions Corp. is seeking to raise as much as $2.23 billion in its initial public offering, in what would be the biggest US listing of an industrial company in close to three decades.

stories.headline: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
stories.summary: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

stories.headline: Trump administration’s secrecy on health deals alarms experts, governments
stories.summary: A dearth of information has been disclosed about the agreements, fueling speculation that the “America First” approach to foreign aid is exploitative.

stories.headline: ‘Cocktail of Hindutva and welfarism’: How Modi’s BJP is wooing Assam voters
stories.summary: Party banks on mix of xenophobic anti-Muslim policies and financial aid schemes aimed at women to retain power in state.

stories.summary: Airfare pricing is no simple business. From dynamic ticketing, to government policies and shifting global factors, what passengers end up paying can be highly unpredictable.

stories.headline: Foreign investment in Spain falls by 22% to lowest level since 2021
stories.summary: FDI in Spain fell by 21.8% in 2025 to €30.764 billion, its lowest level since 2021 despite the expected boost from European funds, according to official data.

stories.headline: Pro-Orbán actors accuse Meta of interference in Hungarian elections, despite lack of evidence
stories.summary: Meta has found itself embroiled in Hungary's tense election campaign, after supporters of the ruling Fidesz party claimed their posts are being restricted to favour opposition parties. In reality, there is no weight to the allegations.

stories.headline: Revellers parade giant phalluses at Japan’s fertility festival
stories.summary: Crowds pack Kawasaki for Kanamara Matsuri, Japan’s colourful fertility festival using phallic shrines to celebrate life and challenge sex taboos.

stories.headline: Hungary alleges plot to blow up gas pipeline ahead of election
stories.summary: It comes a week before votes are cast and follows warnings of so-called false flag operations blamed on Ukraine.

stories.headline: Spain's huge pork industry seeks salvation from swine fever threat
stories.summary: Countries around the world, including the US, have already stopped imports over the outbreak.

stories.headline: Cambodia unveils statue to honour famous landmine-sniffing rat
stories.summary: The statue honours the late African giant pouched rat who sniffed out more than 100 landmines during his lifetime.

stories.headline: Two protests, two elections: How Nepal's Gen Z succeeded where Bangladesh's stumbled

stories.headline: How China fell for a lobster: What an AI assistant tells us about Beijing's ambition
stories.summary: The AI agent sparked a frenzy of "raising lobsters" in March, with users training the tool to suit their needs.

stories.headline: Why McDonald’s and KFC are growing like wildfire in China
stories.summary: Western fast-food brands are expanding into the countryside

stories.headline: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
stories.summary: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

stories.headline: Some Voters Say Congress Is Too Old. These Black Democrats Aren’t Leaving.
stories.summary: As older members of Congress head for the exits amid growing pressure for fresh faces in the Democratic Party, some of the most seasoned Black lawmakers are resisting retirement.

stories.headline: Trump Pledged a Quick End to the Iran War, but He Hasn’t Explained How
stories.summary: President Trump bet that American firepower could cow Iran into compliance. So far, Iran’s leaders have been unwilling to quit.

stories.headline: Russia chose 'Easter escalation' over ceasefire, says Zelensky
stories.summary: Six civilians were killed and 40 others injured as Russia launched hundreds of drones and missiles.

stories.headline: Artemis II crew now halfway to Moon as they take 'spectacular' image of Earth
stories.summary: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

stories.headline: Trump files emergency appeal to keep building White House ballroom
stories.summary: “Time is of the essence!” Justice Department lawyers wrote, saying a ruling to pause construction puts the president at risk.

stories.headline: AI videos fuel rhetoric as Orbán bids for four more years in Hungary
stories.summary: Videos have targeted Viktor Orbán's election rival, who could unseat him after 16 years in office.

stories.headline: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
stories.summary: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.

stories.headline: New Attorney General, Same Albatross: Trump’s Quest for Retribution
stories.summary: The name atop the Justice Department’s organizational chart matters less than the presence of a president whose demands for revenge have become so extreme that even his most obsequious appointees have fallen short.

stories.summary: Min Aung Hlaing presided over his last military parade in Myanmar before he takes up the role of president.

stories.headline: Italy's Uffizi Galleries targeted in cyber-attack but deny security breach
stories.summary: Hackers were reported to have infiltrated IT systems - but the gallery says its works are safe.

stories.summary: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.

stories.headline: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war

stories.headline: One killed and buildings damaged as magnitude 7.4 earthquake strikes Indonesia

Its epicentre was 127km (79 miles) west-north-west of Ternate, an

stories.headline: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
stories.summary: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.

stories.headline: Fears cost of water and beer to soar as India's scorching summer hits

stories.headline: Macron calls Trump's remarks on his marriage 'inelegant'
stories.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron has said Donald Trump's comments about his marriage were "neither elegant nor up to standard".

stories.summary: Lawyers for Naveed Akram had argued his mother, brother and sister live in "constant fear".

stories.headline: China is trying to play peacemaker in the Iran war - will it work?

stories.headline: Asia's migrant workers debate if Gulf jobs are worth deadly risk of Iran war
stories.summary: Iran's strikes on Gulf states have been especially hard for migrants who have long supported these economies to lift their families back home from poverty.

stories.headline: Weather tracker: Thunderstorms drench UAE and Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: Abnormally strong jet stream triggers deluge in Middle East, while north Africa braces for 60-80mph gustsAn unusual weather pattern unleashed severe thunderstorms across parts of the Middle East last week, battering countries including the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia.
